title: Sybase
text: Sybase The Sybase DBMS connector enables you to integrate Sybase databases with Uniface. Connector Description Mnemonic: SYB Supported Version: For the supported platforms and product versions, see the Platform Availability Matrix . Supported utilities Create Table and Load Definitions are supported. SQL support Supported. Stored procedures support Supported.
